data.title: Spot the Difference
data.solution:
from collections import defaultdict
from itertools import product

W, H = map(int, input().split())
grid = [list(input()) for _ in range(H)]
count = defaultdict(list)
for i, j in product(range(H), range(W)):
    count[grid[i][j]].append((i, j))

diff = min(count, key=lambda k: len(count[k]))
pi, pj = count[diff][0]
if pi: grid[pi - 1][pj] = "v"
if pi > 1: grid[pi - 2][pj] = "|"
if pi < H - 1: grid[pi + 1][pj] = "^"
if pi < H - 2: grid[pi + 2][pj] = "|"
if pj: grid[pi][pj - 1] = ">"
if pj > 1: grid[pi][pj - 2] = "-"
if pj < W - 1: grid[pi][pj + 1] = "<"
if pj < W - 2: grid[pi][pj + 2] = "-"

for row in grid:
    print(*row, sep="")
